query:
SELECT 
  'Sem endereço' as campo_faltante, COUNT(*) as count FROM establishments WHERE address IS NULL OR address = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sem bairro', COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE neighborhood IS NULL OR neighborhood = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sem telefone', COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE phone IS NULL OR phone = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sem Instagram', COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE instagram IS NULL OR instagram = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sem horário', COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE hours IS NULL OR hours = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sem cardápio (hasMenu=0)', COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE hasMenu = 0 OR hasMenu IS NULL
